tts_join_success: Joined voice channel {channel}. I'll read messages from {textChannel}.
tts_join_already_joined: I'm already in a voice channel on this server.
tts_join_no_voice: You must be in a voice channel to use this command.
tts_leave_not_joined: I'm not in a voice channel.
tts_say_over_limit: Your message exceeds the {maxChars} character limit.
tts_say_no_api_key: No OpenRouter API key configured. Use /tts settings to set one.
tts_help_join: /tts join — Join your voice channel and bind to a text channel
tts_setup_step_api_key: Step 1: Set your OpenRouter API key via /tts settings api-key
tts_setup_step_defaults: Step 3: Set default voice and model
tts_setup_complete: Setup complete! Your bot is ready to use.
tts_settings_guild_only_user: User TTS settings can only be updated in a server.
tts_settings_guild_only_server: Server settings can only be updated in a server.
tts_settings_voice_picker_header: Choose your preferred TTS voice preset:
tts_settings_voice_selected_success: Your preferred TTS voice is now {voice}.
tts_settings_voice_disallowed: The {voice} voice is not allowed by this server's TTS model settings.
tts_settings_api_key_unauthorized: You do not have permission to update server TTS settings.
tts_settings_max_chars_current: Current {scope} TTS message limit is {maxChars} characters.
tts_settings_max_chars_invalid: TTS message limit must be between {min} and {max} characters.
tts_settings_max_chars_above_server: Channel TTS message limit cannot exceed the server limit of {maxChars} characters.
error_no_api_key: No OpenRouter API key configured for this server. Ask an admin to set one.
error_unauthorized: You don't have permission to use this command.
error_over_budget: This server has exceeded its TTS budget. Contact an admin.
error_rate_limited: You're being rate limited. Please wait a moment.
error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
welcome_dm_body: Thanks for adding me to {guild}! Run /tts setup to get started.
